channel.title: j3seer
channel.description: A Security resaercher's humble blog to post about security related topics, CVEs, thoughts etc...

item.title: Weak Middleware + SaaS Demo Page = Unauthenticated ATO
item.description: A blogpost about a critical vulnerability resulted from giving third parties the responsibility to secure your products
